Gabbard testified IC assessed enrichment 'obliterated' in 2025 strikes. No nuclear weapons pivot from Iran. Still in deterrent zone. Updated 2026-03-19T20:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 Hour 20: IMMINENT. Netanyahu announces halt to further Israel strikes on South Pars at Trump's request — key de-escalatory signal. Netanyahu claims Iran 'can no longer enrich uranium or make ballistic missiles' (unverified). Netanyahu says Israel 'acted alone' on South Pars — contradicting earlier Israeli officials who said US coordinated. Arab League condemns Iranian attacks as 'dangerous escalation'. latest_news.headline: Iran strikes Israeli Haifa oil refinery — first hit on Israeli energy infrastructure
latest_news.text: Iranian missile hits Haifa oil refinery. Energy Minister Cohen says 'no significant damage' reported. First Iranian strike on Israeli energy infrastructure — reciprocal escalation after Israel hit South Pars.

latest_news.headline: Iranian drone crashes into Saudi Samref refinery in Yanbu — oil loading briefly halted
latest_news.text: Iranian drone crashes into Samref refinery (Yanbu). Oil loading halted briefly, resumed after hours. Ballistic missile also intercepted heading toward port. Saudi Arabia intercepts 3 drones in eastern region same day.

latest_news.headline: Israeli officials confirm South Pars attack was coordinated with US — contradicting Trump
latest_news.text: Three Israeli officials tell Reuters South Pars attack was coordinated with Washington. Trump's public denial described as recurring pattern after fuel depot strikes weeks ago. Hegseth also repeats 'we knew nothing'.

Litani bridges destroyed. 450K reservists mobilized. 950+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Central Beirut strikes continue. Economist: Israel 'contemplates ground invasion of Lebanon'. No ceasefire signals. latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 18. QatarEnergy force majeure = 17% of world LNG supply offline for up to 5 years — unprecedented energy shock. Europe+Japan flip on Hormuz signals growing international coalition but NO naval commitments yet (language carefully vague: 'appropriate efforts'). Brent approaching $120 again; $200/barrel scenario now in analyst models. Saudi Arabia's 'military actions if necessary' statement is strongest Gulf military escalation signal yet — watch for follow-through. Pentagon $200B funding request signals US preparing for LONG war, not quick resolution. IRGC 'zero restraint' doctrine unchanged. Israel-Lebanon: no ceasefire signals, Economist reports ground invasion under active contemplation. Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire holds through Mar 23 — post-Eid resumption expected, severity TBD.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu: Israel will halt further attacks on South Pars at Trump's request
latest_news.text: Netanyahu says Israel will hold off on further attacks to Iran's South Pars gas field at President Trump's request. Also claims Israel 'acted alone' in original strike — contradicting earlier Israeli officials who said it was US-coordinated.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu claims Iran 'can no longer enrich uranium or make ballistic missiles'
latest_news.text: Netanyahu says Iran no longer has ability to enrich uranium or manufacture ballistic missiles, though provides no evidence. Supports IC assessment from Gabbard testimony. Unverified claim.

latest_news.headline: Arab League condemns Iranian attacks on Gulf energy sites as 'dangerous escalation'
latest_news.text: Arab League Secretary-General Ahmed Aboul Gheit calls Iran's attacks on Gulf energy infrastructure a 'dangerous escalation'. Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE all formally denounce strikes. First unified Arab League statement on the conflict.

latest_news.headline: Brent crude briefly surges above $119/barrel, European natural gas roughly doubles in a month
latest_news.text: Brent crude briefly exceeded $119/barrel — up over 60% since war began. European natural gas benchmark roughly doubled in one month. Energy crisis deepening as Gulf infrastructure attacks continue.

latest_news.headline: Iran continues intense Gulf strikes: Kuwait refineries, Abu Dhabi gas operations, vessel ablaze off UAE
latest_news.text: Iran strikes two Kuwaiti oil refineries, Abu Dhabi gas operations, and sets vessel ablaze off UAE coast. Another vessel damaged off Qatar. Gulf energy infrastructure under sustained multi-country attack.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 20:04 UTC) — (1) Netanyahu halts Israel strikes on South Pars at Trump's request — key de-escalatory move; (2) Netanyahu claims Iran 'can no longer enrich uranium' — unverified; (3) Arab League condemns Iran attacks as 'dangerous escalation'; (4) Brent briefly above $119, Euro gas doubled in month; (5) Iran continues intense Gulf strikes on Kuwait, UAE, Qatar energy; (6) Israel-Lebanon: ground ops continue, no ceasefire; (7) Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23.
